title: Cantor Equity Partners VI prices $100M IPO at $10 per share
content:
[IPO Initial Public Offering]
 

 

 	* Cantor Equity Partners VI (CEPS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CEPS]), a blank check company sponsored by Cantor Fitzgerald, recently priced [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20388850-cantor-equity-partners-vi-inc-announces-pricing-of-100-million-initial-public-offering] its initial public offering of 10M Class A ordinary shares at $10.00 per share, raising $100M. 
 	* The underwriters have a 45-day option to purchase up to an additional 1.5M shares.
 	* The offering is expected to close on February 6, 2026.
